name: Easy Runza's
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred and cook cabbage until transparent and tender.
2. Spray a cookie sheet with oil.
3. Roll one tube of crescent rolls onto the cookie sheet without separating them.
4. Brown hamburger in a pan, then add the dry onion soup mix and cooked cabbage.
5. Spread the mixture over the rolled-out dough on the cookie sheet.
6. Place a second tube of rolled dough on top.
7. Pinch the edges together to seal.
8. Bake according to directions on the roll package until golden brown.
9. Cut into squares.
